name: Lentil Rice Burgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine rice, lentils, sweet potato, spinach, and mushrooms in a large bowl.
2. Add soy sauce, salt, and pepper. Stir in bread crumbs and cilantro until well combined.
3. Refrigerate for 15 to 39 minutes.
4. Form the mixture into 6 to 8 patties.
5. Oil a vegetable grill generously—these patties tend to stick.
6. Grill for 3 to 4 minutes on each side, until medium brown.
7. Makes 6 to 8 patties. Variation: Instead of burgers, form mixture into small balls. Grill until browned. Serve as a snack with a dipping sauce or add to pasta with your favorite sauce. Per patty: 131 calories; 4g protein; 0.6g fat; 26g carbohydrate; 0 cholesterol; 286mg sodium; 3g fiber
